option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value: { "name": "web", "version": "0.0.1", "type": "module", "private": true, "scripts": { "dev": "next dev --turbopack --port 3002", "build": "next build", "start": "next start --port 3002", "lint": "next lint", "lint:fix": "next lint --fix", "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit", "test": "vitest run", "test:watch": "vitest", "test:ui": "vitest --ui", "test:coverage": "vitest --coverage", "test:e2e": "pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test --project=chromium apps/web", "test:e2e:ui": "pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test --ui --project=chromium apps/web", "svg:optimize": "svgo --config=svgo.config.mjs --folder public/images --recursive", "svg:check": "svgo --config=svgo.config.mjs --folder public/images --recursive --output .svgo-check --quiet" }, "dependencies": { "@gsap/react": "^2.1.2", "@workspace/ui": "workspace:*", "gsap": "^3.14.2", "lucide-react": "^0.475.0", "next": "16.1.7", "next-themes": "^0.4.6", "react": "^19.1.1", "react-dom": "^19.1.1", "svgo": "^4.0.1" }, "devDependencies": { "@playwright/test": "^1.48.1", "@svgr/webpack": "^8.1.0", "@tailwindcss/postcss": "^4.1.11", "@testing-library/react": "^16.1.0", "@types/node": "^20.19.9", "@types/react": "^19.1.9", "@types/react-dom": "^19.1.7", "@vitest/coverage-v8": "^2.1.8", "@workspace/eslint-config": "workspace:^", "@workspace/test-utils": "workspace:*", "@workspace/typescript-config": "workspace:*", "eslint": "^9.32.0", "tailwindcss": "^4.1.11", "typescript": "^5.9.2", "vitest": "^2.1.8" } }

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: { "name": "web", "version": "0.0.1", "type": "module", "private": true, "scripts": { "dev": "next dev --turbopack --port 3002", "build": "next build", "start": "next start --port 3002", "lint": "eslint . --max-warnings=0", "lint:fix": "eslint . --fix", "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit", "test": "vitest run", "test:watch": "vitest", "test:ui": "vitest --ui", "test:coverage": "vitest --coverage", "test:e2e": "pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test --project=chromium apps/web", "test:e2e:ui": "pnpm --dir ../.. exec playwright test --ui --project=chromium apps/web", "svg:optimize": "svgo --config=svgo.config.mjs --folder public/images --recursive", "svg:check": "svgo --config=svgo.config.mjs --folder public/images --recursive --output .svgo-check --quiet" }, "dependencies": { "@gsap/react": "^2.1.2", "@workspace/ui": "workspace:*", "gsap": "^3.14.2", "lucide-react": "^0.475.0", "next": "16.1.7", "next-themes": "^0.4.6", "react": "^19.1.1", "react-dom": "^19.1.1", "svgo": "^4.0.1" }, "devDependencies": { "@playwright/test": "^1.48.1", "@svgr/webpack": "^8.1.0", "@tailwindcss/postcss": "^4.1.11", "@testing-library/react": "^16.1.0", "@types/node": "^20.19.9", "@types/react": "^19.1.9", "@types/react-dom": "^19.1.7", "@vitest/coverage-v8": "^2.1.8", "@workspace/eslint-config": "workspace:^", "@workspace/test-utils": "workspace:*", "@workspace/typescript-config": "workspace:*", "eslint": "^9.32.0", "tailwindcss": "^4.1.11", "typescript": "^5.9.2", "vitest": "^2.1.8" } }
